name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY)
description: Affordable housing for economically weaker sections and low/mid-income groups across urban and rural India.
descriptionHi: शहरी और ग्रामीण भारत में आर्थिक रूप से कमजोर वर्गों के लिए किफायती आवास।
descriptionBn: শহর ও গ্রামীণ ভারতে দুর্বল অর্থনৈতিক বিভাগের জন্য সাশ্রয়ী মূল্যে আবাসন।
shortDesc: Home loan subsidy & affordable housing for EWS/LIG/MIG families.
benefits: Interest subsidy up to 6.5% on home loans
Direct benefit transfer to bank accounts
applicationSteps: Visit the official PMAY portal at pmaymis.gov.in
Click on 'Citizen Assessment' and select your applicable subsidy category
Enter your Aadhaar number and verify via OTP
Fill in personal details: name, address, occupation, income
Provide bank account details for DBT
Upload all required scanned documents
Review and submit the application
Note the Application Reference Number for tracking
Track status at pmaymis.gov.in using your reference number

faqs.q: Who is eligible for PMAY?
faqs.a: Indian citizens belonging to EWS (annual income up to ₹3L), LIG (₹3L–₹6L), MIG-I (₹6L–₹12L), and MIG-II (₹12L–₹18L) categories.

faqs.q: Can I apply if I already own a house?
faqs.a: No. The applicant or any family member should not own a pucca house anywhere in India.

faqs.q: Is there an application fee?
faqs.a: No, there is no application fee for PMAY.

name: PM Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
description: Free skill training and certification for Indian youth across 300+ job roles in 40+ sectors.
descriptionHi: 40+ क्षेत्रों में 300+ नौकरी की भूमिकाओं में भारतीय युवाओं के लिए मुफ्त कौशल प्रशिक्षण।
descriptionBn: ৪০+ খাতে ৩০০+ কাজের ভূমিকায় ভারতীয় যুবকদের জন্য বিনামূল্যে দক্ষতা প্রশিক্ষণ।
shortDesc: Free skill training + ₹8,000 reward + certificate for youth aged 15–45.
benefits: Monetary reward of ₹8,000 on successful completion
applicationSteps: Visit skillindia.gov.in and click 'Find a Training Centre'
Select your state, district, and preferred skill sector
Choose a PMKVY-certified training centre near you
Register online or walk into the training centre
Submit Aadhaar and required documents
Attend training sessions as per schedule
Appear for the Sector Skill Council (SSC) assessment
Receive your PMKVY certificate and monetary reward

faqs.q: Is the training really free?
faqs.a: Yes, the training, assessment, and certification are completely free for all eligible candidates.

faqs.q: What sectors are covered?
faqs.a: IT, Healthcare, Construction, Retail, Beauty & Wellness, Automotive, Agriculture, and 30+ more sectors.

faqs.q: How long is the training?
faqs.a: Duration varies from 150–300 hours depending on the job role selected.

name: PM Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
description: Collateral-free business loans up to ₹10 lakh for micro and small enterprises.
descriptionHi: सूक्ष्म और लघु उद्यमों के लिए ₹10 लाख तक का बिना गारंटी व्यवसाय ऋण।
descriptionBn: ক্ষুদ্র ও ছোট উদ্যোগের জন্য ₹১০ লক্ষ পর্যন্ত জামানত-মুক্ত ব্যবসায়িক ঋণ।
shortDesc: Collateral-free business loans up to ₹10 lakh — Shishu, Kishore, Tarun tiers.
benefits: Low interest rates per RBI guidelines
Available at all banks, NBFCs, and MFIs
applicationSteps: Identify which Mudra loan category fits your need (Shishu/Kishore/Tarun)
Prepare your business plan and collect all documents
Visit your nearest bank branch, NBFC, or MFI
Request the Mudra loan application form
Fill the form and attach all required documents
Bank/NBFC evaluates your application within 7–30 days
Loan sanctioned — funds transferred to your account

faqs.q: Do I need a business plan?
faqs.a: For Shishu loans, a simple purpose statement is enough. Kishore and Tarun require a detailed business plan.

faqs.q: Can women entrepreneurs get a lower interest rate?
faqs.a: Yes, many banks offer preferential interest rates (0.25%–0.5% lower) for women borrowers under MUDRA.

faqs.q: What if my loan application is rejected?
faqs.a: You can approach SIDBI's regional office or contact the MUDRA helpline at 1800-180-1111.

name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP)
description: One-stop platform for 50+ central and state scholarship schemes for students from Class 1 to PhD.
descriptionHi: कक्षा 1 से पीएचडी तक के छात्रों के लिए 50+ केंद्र और राज्य छात्रवृत्ति योजनाओं का एकल पोर्टल।
descriptionBn: ক্লাস ১ থেকে পিএইচডি পর্যন্ত শিক্ষার্থীদের জন্য ৫০+ কেন্দ্র ও রাজ্য বৃত্তি প্রকল্পের একক পোর্টাল।
shortDesc: 50+ scholarships from Class 1 to PhD — single application, direct DBT.
benefits: Direct Benefit Transfer to bank account
applicationSteps: Visit scholarships.gov.in and click 'New Registration'
Select academic year and enter Aadhaar number
Verify your identity via OTP sent to Aadhaar-linked mobile
Set a password and complete your profile
Fill academic details: institution, course, marks
Enter family income and bank account details
Upload all scanned documents (PDF/JPEG)
Review and submit — note your Application ID
Track renewal and status on the portal

faqs.q: Can I apply for multiple scholarships?
faqs.a: Yes, NSP allows applying to multiple schemes in a single registration, subject to eligibility.

faqs.q: When does the application window open?
faqs.a: Generally from July–November each academic year. Check the portal for current deadlines.

faqs.q: What happens if I miss the deadline?
faqs.a: You cannot apply after the deadline. Watch for portal notifications for reopening windows.

name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: ₹6,000/year direct income support to all farmer families, paid in 3 installments of ₹2,000.
descriptionHi: सभी किसान परिवारों को ₹6,000/वर्ष प्रत्यक्ष आय सहायता, ₹2,000 की 3 किश्तों में।
descriptionBn: সকল কৃষক পরিবারকে ₹৬,০০০/বছর প্রত্যক্ষ আয় সহায়তা, ₹২,০০০-এর ৩টি কিস্তিতে।
shortDesc: ₹6,000/year in 3 installments for all landholding farmers — direct DBT.
benefits: All landholding farmer families are eligible
Can be linked with Kisan Credit Card
applicationSteps: Visit pmkisan.gov.in and click 'Farmer Registration'
Select your state and enter Aadhaar number
Verify via OTP and fill personal details
Enter land ownership details (survey number, area)
Provide bank account number and IFSC code
Submit — registration is approved by local Patwari/revenue officer
After approval, installments are credited every 4 months
Track payment via 'Beneficiary Status' on the portal

faqs.q: What if a farmer died — can the family receive benefits?
faqs.a: The surviving spouse (widow) can apply by updating the beneficiary name through the local revenue office.

faqs.q: My eKYC is pending — will I get the installment?
faqs.a: No. eKYC is mandatory. Complete it at the PM-KISAN portal or at the nearest CSC.

faqs.q: I'm a tenant farmer — am I eligible?
faqs.a: No. Only landholding farmer families in the government land records are eligible.

name: PM Internship Scheme
description: 12-month paid internship at India's top 500 companies with ₹5,000/month stipend for youth aged 21–24.
descriptionHi: 21–24 वर्ष के युवाओं के लिए शीर्ष 500 कंपनियों में 12 महीने की इंटर्नशिप, ₹5,000/माह स्टाइपेंड।
descriptionBn: ২১-২৪ বছর বয়সী যুবকদের জন্য শীর্ষ ৫০০ কোম্পানিতে ১২ মাসের ইন্টার্নশিপ, মাসিক ₹৫,০০০।
shortDesc: 12-month paid internship at top 500 companies — ₹5,000/month + ₹6,000 grant.
benefits: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima + PM Suraksha Bima coverage
Placement in sectors like IT, Manufacturing, BFSI, Infra
applicationSteps: Register at pminternship.mca.gov.in with Aadhaar
Complete your profile: academic background, skills, preferences
Browse internship opportunities by sector and location
Apply to up to 5 internship positions of your choice
Wait for company shortlisting (you'll be notified by email/SMS)
Accept the internship offer within the given deadline
Complete joining formalities with the company
Receive stipend monthly in your bank account

faqs.q: Can engineering graduates apply?
faqs.a: Yes, but IIT/IIM graduates are not eligible. Only candidates from non-premier institutions qualify.

faqs.q: Can I work part-time during the internship?
faqs.a: No. The internship is a full-time 12-month commitment.

faqs.q: What if the company terminates the internship early?
faqs.a: You can re-apply on the portal for a new internship opportunity.

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
description: Promotes welfare, education, and protection of the girl child through convergent action across ministries.
descriptionHi: बालिकाओं के कल्याण, शिक्षा और संरक्षण को बढ़ावा देने के लिए मंत्रालयों में समन्वित कार्रवाई।
descriptionBn: মন্ত্রণালয়গুলির মধ্যে সমন্বিত পদক্ষেপের মাধ্যমে কন্যাশিশুর কল্যাণ, শিক্ষা ও সুরক্ষা প্রসার।
shortDesc: Girl child protection + Sukanya Samriddhi Account with high-interest savings.
benefits: Sukanya Samriddhi Account with 8%+ interest rate
Conditional cash transfers for girl child education
Scholarships and free hostel for girls
applicationSteps: Open a Sukanya Samriddhi Account at any post office or bank
Visit local Anganwadi centre for registration under BBBP
Provide birth certificate, parents' Aadhaar and address proof
Enroll girl child in a government school for education benefits
Receive conditional cash benefits in Aadhaar-linked bank account
Sukanya Samriddhi matures when girl turns 21

faqs.q: What is the minimum deposit for Sukanya Samriddhi?
faqs.a: Minimum ₹250/year, maximum ₹1.5 lakh/year. Account matures when the girl turns 21.

faqs.q: Can a single parent open a SSA?
faqs.a: Yes, single parents (mother or father) can open and operate the account.

faqs.q: Can I open SSA for two daughters?
faqs.a: Yes, up to two SSAs are allowed per family (three in case of twins/triplets).

name: Startup India Seed Fund
description: Financial assistance up to ₹20L for POC and ₹50L for product trials for early-stage DPIIT-recognized startups.
descriptionHi: प्रारंभिक चरण के DPIIT-मान्यता प्राप्त स्टार्टअप के लिए POC हेतु ₹20L और उत्पाद परीक्षण हेतु ₹50L।
descriptionBn: প্রাথমিক পর্যায়ের DPIIT-স্বীকৃত স্টার্টআপের জন্য POC-এ ₹২০L এবং পণ্য পরীক্ষায় ₹৫০L।
shortDesc: Up to ₹20L grant for POC + ₹50L for product launch — DPIIT startups only.
benefits: Grants up to ₹20 lakh for proof-of-concept
Debt/convertible debentures up to ₹50 lakh for market entry
documents: Bank Account Details of the Startup
applicationSteps: Register your startup on startupindia.gov.in and get DPIIT recognition
Visit seedfund.startupindia.gov.in
Browse the list of empaneled incubators
Apply to an incubator of your choice with pitch deck
Incubator's Experts Committee evaluates the application
If shortlisted, present to the committee in person or virtually
Sign grant agreement with the incubator upon selection
Receive disbursement in milestones as per agreement

faqs.q: Does my startup need to be incorporated?
faqs.a: Yes, your startup must be incorporated and DPIIT-recognized before applying.

faqs.q: Can I apply to multiple incubators?
faqs.a: Yes, but you can only receive the grant from one incubator.

faqs.q: Is there an equity stake taken by the government?
faqs.a: No equity is taken for grants. For debt instruments, conversion terms are defined in the agreement.
